concepts.name: Synesthesia
concepts.summary: The whole page is a generative audio-visual instrument that 'hears' your cursor. Move it to play standing waves of light; click a project to fire a chromatic ripple and a tuned tone across the screen.

concepts.name: Determinism
concepts.tagline: Free will is limited — made literal
concepts.summary: Your identity and projects are agents in a deterministic force field. Grab and scatter them and they fight back, then implode and re-order into their fated arrangement. An interface that argues a worldview.

concepts.name: Home is Planet Earth
concepts.summary: A dark, cinematic globe you spin and zoom. Your multi-city life rises as labeled light-pillars, projects trail past as comet-tailed satellites, and a meridian readout names whatever is crossing front-and-center.

concepts.name: Four Selves
concepts.summary: One URL that is four designs. The entire visual language — type, color, layout, motion — morphs live between your four identities. The multi-hyphenate, expressed as a shapeshifting page.

concepts.name: Living Manuscript
concepts.summary: The page composes itself in kinetic type — bio, a principle, a line of poetry — then invites you to type. A conversational poem-terminal where the portfolio writes itself and answers back.
